pr_text:
## Title: Fix race condition in timeline widget allocator

### Summary
The `allocate` function in the timeline GUI component lacked proper synchronization when modifying shared widget data, creating a race condition under concurrent access. The function directly manipulated widget properties (`common.x`, `common.y`, `common.width`, `common.height`) and performed memory reallocation on `this->s[i].color` without acquiring the GUI lock, while other functions in the same file correctly use `glock()
